title: Patch Prescriber score to reaffirm SRX at-most-one-miss rule
description: Implement the approved Prescriber clarification from item 305259519 that SRX follows the published at-most-one-miss threshold and does not require prescriber verification for each medication. Apply the change on top of version 770575d5-b3dd-4939-a19d-64ac99fb592e so the prior prescribed-by recognition stays intact. Update both the score guidelines and the current non-champion score version with a minimal wording patch; do not broaden other Prescriber rules or change optimizer direction.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Created Prescriber score version ba041b6a-8786-4f31-b082-31b5f999b0e7 from parent 770575d5-b3dd-4939-a19d-64ac99fb592e. This patch explicitly reaffirms the published SRX threshold that at most one unresolved current-medication miss still passes and rejects the stricter verify-each-medication interpretation, while retaining the prior prescribed-by recognition wording. Champion promotion was requested but not performed because agent policy blocks champion promotion even with user approval; evaluate the candidate version directly.
